title: Malik and the Missing Magnets
synopsis: When all the magnets disappear from Malik's science classroom, he becomes a detective to solve the mystery. Using his observation skills and scientific knowledge, Malik searches through cluttered rooms and follows clues to discover what happened to the missing magnets.

pages.text: Malik loved science class more than anything. He had short twists, dark brown skin, and gentle expressive eyes that lit up when he learned new things. Today, Mrs. Chen was going to teach about magnets.

illustration.description: A busy classroom scene with Malik, a boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes, sitting at a desk surrounded by science equipment, books, pencils, rulers, paper clips, crayons, erasers, and various small classroom objects scattered everywhere in an organized but cluttered arrangement
illustration.alt: Malik sitting in a cluttered science classroom

pages.text: But when Mrs. Chen opened the science cabinet, she gasped. 'Oh no!' she said. 'All our magnets are gone! We had ten horseshoe magnets, five bar magnets, and twenty magnetic marbles. They've all disappeared!'

illustration.description: An empty science cabinet with many shelves containing beakers, test tubes, measuring cups, scissors, batteries, wires, springs, bolts, screws, buttons, coins, and other small scientific instruments, with Malik (short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes) and Mrs. Chen looking inside
illustration.alt: Empty science cabinet with missing magnets

pages.text: Malik raised his hand. 'Mrs. Chen, I can be a science detective! I'll help find the missing magnets.' He knew that magnets stick to things made of iron and steel. This was an important clue.

illustration.description: A detailed view of the classroom from above showing Malik (short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes) standing with his hand raised, surrounded by desks covered with notebooks, pencils, staplers, paper clips, scissors, calculators, toy cars, keys, and many other small metal and non-metal objects
illustration.alt: Malik volunteering to solve the magnet mystery

pages.text: Malik started his investigation. He looked carefully around the classroom. On Jenny's desk, he saw paper clips stuck together in a long chain. 'That's strange,' he thought. 'Paper clips don't stick together by themselves.'

illustration.description: A magnifying glass view of Jenny's cluttered desk showing chains of paper clips, along with erasers, crayons, rubber bands, thumbtacks, safety pins, bobby pins, coins, buttons, stamps, stickers, and tiny toy figures, with Malik (short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes) examining the scene
illustration.alt: Malik examining paper clip chains on a cluttered desk

pages.text: Next, Malik noticed something weird near the pencil sharpener. All the metal shavings were stuck in one spot on the wall. 'Magnets make metal things stick!' he said excitedly. He was getting closer to solving the mystery.

illustration.description: A detailed scene showing a wall area near a pencil sharpener covered with metal shavings, staples, pushpins, paper clips, and tiny screws all clustered together, with Malik (short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes) pointing at the wall, surrounded by shelves full of books, supplies, and small objects
illustration.alt: Metal shavings mysteriously stuck to the classroom wall

pages.text: Then Malik heard a strange sound from the supply closet. 'Clank, clank, rattle!' Something was moving inside. He opened the door carefully and peered into the dark, crowded closet full of school supplies.

illustration.description: A busy supply closet viewed through the doorway, packed with boxes, binders, folders, art supplies, cleaning bottles, mops, buckets, sports equipment, and many small items scattered on shelves, with Malik (short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes) cautiously opening the door
illustration.alt: Malik opening the mysterious supply closet door

pages.text: Inside the closet, Malik found Whiskers, the class hamster! The little hamster had somehow escaped from his cage. In his cheek pouches were three magnetic marbles. All around him were the missing magnets!

illustration.description: Inside the cluttered supply closet showing Whiskers the hamster surrounded by scattered horseshoe magnets, bar magnets, magnetic marbles, along with paper clips, staples, safety pins, screws, nails, washers, and other metal objects all attracted to the magnets, with Malik (short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes) discovering the scene
illustration.alt: Whiskers the hamster surrounded by the missing magnets in the supply closet

pages.text: 'Mystery solved!' Malik announced to the class. 'Whiskers collected the magnets like treasures! He didn't know they would attract all the metal things in the classroom. That's why we saw paper clips sticking together and metal shavings on the wall.'

illustration.description: The classroom scene with all the students gathered around as Malik (short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes) holds Whiskers, with the recovered magnets displayed on a table along with various attracted metal objects like paper clips, staples, coins, keys, small tools, and office supplies spread across the surface
illustration.alt: Malik presenting the solved mystery to his classmates

pages.text: Mrs. Chen was so proud of Malik's detective work. 'You used real science to solve this mystery!' she said. 'Now we can learn about magnets properly.' Malik smiled. Being a science detective was the best job ever!

illustration.description: The happy classroom with Malik (short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes) at the center, surrounded by classmates and Mrs. Chen, with the science cabinet now full of organized magnets and metal objects, plus charts, diagrams, microscopes, and other scientific equipment visible throughout the busy but orderly learning environment
illustration.alt: Malik celebrated as the science detective hero

metadata.illustrationStyle: detailed hidden objects, visual clues, busy organized composition, search and find, detailed environment, many small objects, magnifying glass perspective, cluttered room or scene

questions.question: What was missing from the science cabinet?
questions.explanation: All the magnets disappeared from the science cabinet, including horseshoe magnets, bar magnets, and magnetic marbles.

questions.question: What clue did Malik find on Jenny's desk?
questions.explanation: Malik found paper clips stuck together in a chain, which was strange because paper clips don't stick together by themselves - only magnets could cause this.

questions.question: Who had taken the magnets?
questions.explanation: Whiskers the class hamster had escaped and collected all the magnets like treasures in the supply closet.

questions.question: What do magnets stick to?
questions.explanation: Magnets stick to things made of iron and steel, which is why all the metal objects in the classroom were attracted to the missing magnets.

questions.question: Where did Malik find the missing magnets?
questions.explanation: Malik found all the missing magnets in the supply closet where Whiskers the hamster had collected them.
